# EU-112™ — EU AI Act Operational Readiness

> Free software, support, and done-for-you implementation for AI inventory, governance, oversight, evidence and operational readiness.

## Core pages
- [Homepage](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/index.html)
- [Start Free](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/start-free.html)
- [Offer](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/offer.html)
- [Guide: 50 Modules](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/guide.html)
- [Blog](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/blog.html)
- [Contact](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/contact.html)

## Role pages
- [Firm Owners](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/firm-owners.html)
- [Marketing Agencies](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/marketing-agencies.html)
- [Media Newsrooms](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/media-newsrooms.html)
- [IT Departments](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/it-departments.html)
- [Non-EU AI Providers](https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/non-eu-ai-providers.html)

## Boundaries
Not legal advice. Not certification. Not a notified body. Operational readiness and evidence support only.
